ideation: This animation sequence simulates the careful, focused movements of someone using a microscope. The robot will hold its hands as if holding a microscope, bringing its hands slowly together and then pulling them apart slightly. The sequence will start with the arms extended, then move to a focused pose, slightly pulling the arms together, then slowly returning to the extended position. This will mimic the action of peering through a microscope.  The sequence will primarily focus on the left arm, with the right arm providing balance and support. This will add naturalness to the animation, avoiding stiff movements.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, ready to examine
hands draw closer, focusing on the unseen
arms pull back slightly, the observation continues
